revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:八神殿); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/53580993 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:八神殿 | revid=53580993 --> 『延喜式』神名帳では御巫八座とは別に大直日神一座がすぐ続けてあげられており、このどちらも[[鎮魂祭|鎮魂式]]での祭神のはずですが、御巫八座が「八神殿」に祭られているのはわかるとして、大直日神はいったいどこに祭られていたんでしょうか？--[[特別:投稿記録/111.188.19.77|111.188.19.77]] 2014年11月21日 (金) 07:03 (UTC)----

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hasshinden here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hasshinden for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/53580993 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:八神殿 | revid=53580993 --> 『延喜式』神名帳では御巫八座とは別に大直日神一座がすぐ続けてあげられており、このどちらも[[鎮魂祭|鎮魂式]]での祭神のはずですが、御巫八座が「八神殿」に祭られているのはわかるとして、大直日神はいったいどこに祭られていたんでしょうか？--[[特別:投稿記録/111.188.19.77|111.188.19.77]] 2014年11月21日 (金) 07:03 (UTC)----
